changes.summary: Canonical BC-12 REST auth adapter (Phase 8): thin transport layer delegating OAuth (InitiateOAuthUseCase, CompleteOAuthCallbackUseCase), passkey (RegisterPasskeyUseCase, AuthenticatePasskeyUseCase), OTP (Send/Verify SMS and Email use cases), magic link (RedeemMagicLinkUseCase), and call status (VerifyCallCheckUseCase). Fake/mock auth, logout/clear-cookies, deprecated GET /me, and call/init remain direct infrastructure/service calls (no dedicated use cases yet). inv-18 envelope shapes preserved per endpoint.
Export AuthController from REST adapter barrel.
Deprecated re-export shim pointing to adapters/rest/auth.controller (entity-mappers retirement pattern).
Register AuthController from adapters/rest; auth services remain module providers.

verification.attempt_1_delta: none — attempt 0 migration verified complete; prior partial verdict was LLM scratch file path error only

notes: Attempt 1 re-verifies attempt 0 work: tsc/lint/static passed; REST AuthController lives under adapters/rest; api-v1/auth/auth.controller.ts is a deprecated re-export; AuthModule wires adapter controller. call/init still uses SmsProviderService.initiateCallVerification (no InitCallCheckUseCase). Use cases constructed manually in constructor.
